arn.description: Amazon Resource Name used for IAM policies and API interactions

bootstrap_brokers.description: Comma-separated list of broker endpoints for plain text clients

bootstrap_brokers_public_sasl_iam.description: Public broker endpoints with SASL/IAM authentication for secure access

bootstrap_brokers_public_sasl_scram.description: Public broker endpoints with SASL/SCRAM authentication for secure access

bootstrap_brokers_public_tls.description: Public broker endpoints with TLS encryption for secure communication

bootstrap_brokers_sasl_iam.description: Private broker endpoints with SASL/IAM authentication for internal access

bootstrap_brokers_sasl_scram.description: Private broker endpoints with SASL/SCRAM authentication for internal access

bootstrap_brokers_tls.description: Private broker endpoints with TLS encryption for secure communication

bootstrap_brokers_vpc_connectivity_sasl_.description: VPC broker endpoints with SASL/IAM for private network access
VPC broker endpoints with SASL/SCRAM for private network access

bootstrap_brokers_vpc_connectivity_tls.description: VPC broker endpoints with TLS encryption for private network communication

cluster_uuid.description: Unique identifier of the MSK cluster for tracking and management

current_version.description: Current configuration version of the MSK cluster

id.description: Unique identifier for referencing the MSK cluster in Terraform

tags_all.description: All tags associated with the MSK cluster for organization and filtering

zookeeper_connect_string.description: Comma-separated list of Zookeeper endpoints for plain text connections

zookeeper_connect_string_tls.description: Comma-separated list of Zookeeper endpoints with TLS encryption
